TABLE.NAME: crucible
TABLE.COMMENT: each record is one crucible resource

FIELD.NAME: introformat
FIELD.COMMENT: intro text format.

FIELD.NAME: eventtemplateid
FIELD.COMMENT: The is the gui

FIELD.NAME: timeopen
FIELD.COMMENT: The time when this quiz opens. (0 = no restriction.)

FIELD.NAME: timeclose
FIELD.COMMENT: The time when this quiz closes. (0 = no restriction.)

FIELD.NAME: grade
FIELD.COMMENT: The total that the quiz is scaled out of.

FIELD.NAME: grademethod
FIELD.COMMENT: The grading method for grading. This applies to grading multiple attempts

FIELD.NAME: contentlicense
FIELD.COMMENT: License information for content in TopoMojo

FIELD.NAME: showcontentlicense
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether to show the content license (1 = show, 0 = hide)

TABLE.NAME: crucible_grades
TABLE.COMMENT: crucible grades table to hold grades for individual users

FIELD.NAME: crucibleid
FIELD.COMMENT: the crucible id

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The userid that this grade is for

FIELD.NAME: grade
FIELD.COMMENT: The grade for this user, for this crucible lab

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: The time created/modified for this grade

TABLE.NAME: crucible_attempts
TABLE.COMMENT: The crucible attempts table to hold attempts for students

FIELD.NAME: crucibleid
FIELD.COMMENT: The id of the crucible lab for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: scenarioid
FIELD.COMMENT: The steamfitter scenario guid for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: eventid
FIELD.COMMENT: The alloy event guid for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: The userid for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: state
FIELD.COMMENT: The current state of the attempts. 'inprogress', 'overdue', 'finished' or 'abandoned'.

FIELD.NAME: tasks
FIELD.COMMENT: The tasks for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: score
FIELD.COMMENT: The score for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: endtime
FIELD.COMMENT: The expirationDate of the event

FIELD.NAME: timestart
FIELD.COMMENT: The time this attempt began

FIELD.NAME: timefinish
FIELD.COMMENT: The time this attempt ended

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: The time this attempt was modified

TABLE.NAME: crucible_tasks
TABLE.COMMENT: The table to hold steamfitter tasks

FIELD.NAME: crucibleid
FIELD.COMMENT: the crucible id

FIELD.NAME: scenariotemplateid
FIELD.COMMENT: The steamfitter scenario template guid for this attempt

FIELD.NAME: dispatchtaskid
FIELD.COMMENT: The steamfitter guid for this task

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: The task name

FIELD.NAME: description
FIELD.COMMENT: The task description

FIELD.NAME: gradable
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the task is gradable

FIELD.NAME: visible
FIELD.COMMENT: Whether the task is visible

FIELD.NAME: points
FIELD.COMMENT: The max points for this task

FIELD.NAME: multiple
FIELD.COMMENT: Process multiple vms as separate tasks

TABLE.NAME: crucible_task_results
TABLE.COMMENT: The table to hold attempt task results for students

FIELD.NAME: taskid
FIELD.COMMENT: The id of the task

FIELD.NAME: dispatchtaskid
FIELD.COMMENT: The scenario task guid for this result

FIELD.NAME: attemptid
FIELD.COMMENT: The id of the crucible attempt

FIELD.NAME: vmname
FIELD.COMMENT: The vm name for this result

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: The steamfitter task status

FIELD.NAME: score
FIELD.COMMENT: Score given to the student

FIELD.NAME: comment
FIELD.COMMENT: A comment added by a teacher

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: The time this result was modified

TABLE.NAME: crucible_attempt_users
TABLE.COMMENT: Users that have been added to a Crucible attempt

TABLE.NAME: crucible_bulkdeploy_job
TABLE.COMMENT: Bulk deployment jobs for managing mass deployments of crucible events

FIELD.NAME: crucibleid
FIELD.COMMENT: the crucible activity id

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: the course id

FIELD.NAME: initiatorid
FIELD.COMMENT: userid of instructor who created the job

FIELD.NAME: batchsize
FIELD.COMMENT: number of concurrent deployments (always 1 for Crucible)

FIELD.NAME: rolefilter
FIELD.COMMENT: CSV of role IDs to filter by, null = all roles

FIELD.NAME: totalusers
FIELD.COMMENT: total number of users in this job

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: Job status: queued, running, cancelling, cancelled, completed, failed

FIELD.NAME: errormessage
FIELD.COMMENT: Error message if job failed

FIELD.NAME: cancelledby
FIELD.COMMENT: userid who cancelled the job

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: when job was created

FIELD.NAME: timestarted
FIELD.COMMENT: when job started running

FIELD.NAME: timecompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: when job finished (completed/cancelled/failed)

FIELD.NAME: timecancelled
FIELD.COMMENT: when job was cancelled

FIELD.NAME: scheduledfor
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp for scheduled deployment, null = immediate

TABLE.NAME: crucible_bulkdeploy_user
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-user deployment status for bulk deployment jobs

FIELD.NAME: jobid
FIELD.COMMENT: the bulkdeploy_job id

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: the user being deployed

FIELD.NAME: eventid
FIELD.COMMENT: Alloy event GUID after deployment

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: Deployment status: pending, launched, ready, skipped, failed, cancelled

FIELD.NAME: errormessage
FIELD.COMMENT: Error message if deployment failed

FIELD.NAME: timestarted
FIELD.COMMENT: when deployment started for this user

FIELD.NAME: timecompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: when deployment finished for this user
